---
title: "Women's Health"
author:
  - name: "Maria Teresa Brito"
  - name: "Nathan Constantine-Cooke"
    corresponding: true
    url: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=2emHWR0AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao
    affiliations:
      - ref: IGC
bibliography: Survival.bib   
---

## Introduction

```{R}
#| message: false
source("Survival/utils.R")

# Load libraries
load_libraries()

# Setup data paths
paths <- set_paths()

# Setup data path for women's health data
if (file.exists("/docker")) {
  wh_data_path <- "data/final/"
} else {
  if (Sys.info()["sysname"] != "Darwin") {
    # Windows
    wh_data_path <- "//cmvm.datastore.ed.ac.uk/igmm/cvallejo-predicct/people/Teresa/PREdiCCt/"
  } else {
    # MacOS
    wh_data_path <- "/Volumes/igmm/cvallejo-predicct/people/Teresa/PREdiCCt/"
  }
}

# Load women's health data
demo <- read.csv(paste0(
  wh_data_path,
  "Womenshealth working file.csv"
)) %>%
  mutate(
    Age = as.numeric(Age),
    softflare_time = as.numeric(softflare_time),
    softflare = as.numeric(softflare),
    hardflare_time = as.numeric(hardflare_time),
    hardflare = as.numeric(hardflare),
    IBD_Duration = as.numeric(IBD_Duration),
    FC = as.numeric(FC)
  ) %>%
  mutate(FC = exp(FC))

# Set menopausal status factor levels
demo$meno2 <- factor(demo$meno2, levels = c("Pre-menopausal", "Post-menopausal"))

# Create hormonal contraception variables
demo <- demo %>%
  mutate(
    hormonal = case_when(
      Patch == 1 | Ring == 1 | OralContraceptionPill == "COCP" ~ "Combined",
      OralContraceptionPill == "POP" ~ "POP",
      Injectable == 1 ~ "Injection",
      Implant == 1 ~ "Implant",
      IntrauterineContraceptionDevice == "Mirena" ~ "IUS", 
      TRUE ~ "None"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    hormonal2 = case_when(
      (hormonal == "Combined" |
         hormonal == "POP" |
         hormonal == "Injection" |
         hormonal == "Implant" |
         hormonal == "IUS") ~ "Yes",
      hormonal == "None" ~ "No"
    )
  )
```

This page describes associations between women's health factors and time-to-flare, including menopausal status and hormonal contraception use.

## Menopausal Status

### Crohn's Disease

::: {.panel-tabset group="followup"}

#### Patient-reported flare

```{R}
#| results: "hold"
#| output: "asis"
#| fig-height: 6.5
#| warning: false

# Filter to CD patients
flare.cd.df <- demo %>%
  filter(diagnosis == "CD")

# Generate Kaplan-Meier survival plot
fit <- survfit(Surv(softflare_time, softflare) ~ meno2, data = flare.cd.df)

p <- ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = flare.cd.df,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  pval = TRUE,
  pval.method = TRUE,
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
  risk.table = TRUE,
  legend.title = "Menopausal status",
  legend.labs = c(
    "Pre-menopausal",
    "Post-menopausal"
  ),
  xlab = "Time from study recruitment (days)",
  title = "Time to patient-reported flare (CD)",
  break.time.by = 200
)

dir.create("plots/cd/soft-flare/menopause",
           recursive = TRUE,
           showWarnings = FALSE)

plot_path <- "plots/cd/soft-flare/menopause/menopause"

cairo_pdf(paste0(plot_path, ".pdf"))
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(invisible(dev.off()))

png(paste0(plot_path, ".png"), width = 7, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(plot_path, ".png"))

# Fit Cox model
fit.me <- coxph(
  Surv(softflare_time, softflare) ~
    Age +
    IMD +
    cat +
    BMIcat +
    Smoke +
    meno2 +
    frailty(SiteNo),
  control = coxph.control(outer.max = 20),
  data = flare.cd.df
)

invisible(cox_summary(fit.me, plot_base_path = plot_path))
```

#### Objective flare

```{R}
#| results: "hold"
#| output: "asis"
#| fig-height: 6.5

# Generate Kaplan-Meier survival plot
fit <- survfit(Surv(hardflare_time, hardflare) ~ meno2, data = flare.cd.df)

p <- ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = flare.cd.df,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  pval = TRUE,
  pval.method = TRUE,
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
  risk.table = TRUE,
  legend.title = "Menopausal status",
  legend.labs = c(
    "Pre-menopausal",
    "Post-menopausal"
  ),
  xlab = "Time from study recruitment (days)",
  title = "Time to objective flare (CD)",
  break.time.by = 200
)

dir.create("plots/cd/hard-flare/menopause",
           recursive = TRUE,
           showWarnings = FALSE)
plot_path <- "plots/cd/hard-flare/menopause/menopause"

cairo_pdf(paste0(plot_path, ".pdf"))
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

png(paste0(plot_path, ".png"), width = 7, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(plot_path, ".png"))

# Fit Cox model
fit.me <- coxph(
  Surv(hardflare_time, hardflare) ~ Age + IMD + cat + BMIcat + Smoke + meno2 + frailty(SiteNo),
  control = coxph.control(outer.max = 20),
  data = flare.cd.df
)

invisible(cox_summary(fit.me, plot_base_path = plot_path))
```

:::

### Ulcerative Colitis

::: {.panel-tabset group="followup"}

#### Patient-reported flare

```{R}
#| results: "hold"
#| output: "asis"
#| fig-height: 6.5

# Filter to UC/IBDU patients
flare.uc.df <- demo %>%
  filter(!diagnosis == "CD")

# Generate Kaplan-Meier survival plot
fit <- survfit(Surv(softflare_time, softflare) ~ meno2, data = flare.uc.df)

p <- ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = flare.uc.df,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  pval = TRUE,
  pval.method = TRUE,
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
  risk.table = TRUE,
  legend.title = "Menopausal status",
  legend.labs = c(
    "Pre-menopausal",
    "Post-menopausal"
  ),
  xlab = "Time from study recruitment (days)",
  title = "Time to patient-reported flare (UC/IBDU)",
  break.time.by = 200
)

dir.create("plots/uc/soft-flare/menopause",
           recursive = TRUE,
           showWarnings = FALSE)

plot_path <- "plots/uc/soft-flare/menopause/menopause"

cairo_pdf(paste0(plot_path, ".pdf"))
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

png(paste0(plot_path, ".png"), width = 7, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(plot_path, ".png"))

# Fit Cox model
fit.me <- coxph(
  Surv(softflare_time, softflare) ~ Age + IMD + cat + BMIcat + Smoke + meno2 + frailty(SiteNo),
  control = coxph.control(outer.max = 20),
  data = flare.uc.df
)

invisible(cox_summary(fit.me, plot_base_path = plot_path))
```

#### Objective flare

```{R}
#| results: "hold"
#| output: "asis"
#| fig-height: 6.5

# Generate Kaplan-Meier survival plot
fit <- survfit(Surv(hardflare_time, hardflare) ~ meno2, data = flare.uc.df)

p <- ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = flare.uc.df,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  pval = TRUE,
  pval.method = TRUE,
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
  risk.table = TRUE,
  legend.title = "Menopausal status",
  legend.labs = c(
    "Pre-menopausal",
    "Post-menopausal"
  ),
  xlab = "Time from study recruitment (days)",
  title = "Time to objective flare (UC/IBDU)",
  break.time.by = 200
)

dir.create("plots/uc/hard-flare/menopause",
           recursive = TRUE,
           showWarnings = FALSE)
plot_path <- "plots/uc/hard-flare/menopause/menopause"

cairo_pdf(paste0(plot_path, ".pdf"))
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

png(paste0(plot_path, ".png"), width = 7, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(plot_path, ".png"))

# Fit Cox model
fit.me <- coxph(
  Surv(hardflare_time, hardflare) ~ Age + IMD + cat + BMIcat + Smoke + meno2 + frailty(SiteNo),
  control = coxph.control(outer.max = 20),
  data = flare.uc.df
)

invisible(cox_summary(fit.me, plot_base_path = plot_path))
```

:::

### All IBD

::: {.panel-tabset group="followup"}

#### Patient-reported flare

```{R}
#| results: "hold"
#| output: "asis"
#| fig-height: 6.5

# Generate Kaplan-Meier survival plot
fit <- survfit(Surv(softflare_time, softflare) ~ meno2, data = demo)

p <- ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = demo,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  pval = TRUE,
  pval.method = TRUE,
  pval.size = 5,
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
  risk.table = TRUE,
  fontsize = 6,
  legend.title = "",
  legend.labs = c(
    "Pre-menopausal",
    "Post-menopausal"
  ),
  font.legend = c(10),
  xlab = "Time from study recruitment (days)",
  font.x = c(14),
  font.y = c(14),
  title = "Time to patient-reported flare stratified by menopausal status",
  font.title = c(14, "bold"),
  break.time.by = 200,
  palette = c("#b163c1", "#63c1b1")
)

dir.create("plots/ibd/soft-flare/menopause",
           recursive = TRUE,
           showWarnings = FALSE)

plot_path <- "plots/ibd/soft-flare/menopause/menopause2"

cairo_pdf(paste0(plot_path, ".pdf"))
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

png(paste0(plot_path, ".png"), width = 7, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(plot_path, ".png"))

# Fit Cox model
fit.me <- coxph(
  Surv(softflare_time, softflare) ~ Age + IMD + cat + BMIcat + Smoke + IBD_Duration + meno2 + frailty(SiteNo),
  control = coxph.control(outer.max = 20),
  data = demo
)

invisible(cox_summary(fit.me, plot_base_path = plot_path))
```

#### Objective flare

```{R}
#| results: "hold"
#| output: "asis"
#| fig-height: 6.5

# Generate Kaplan-Meier survival plot
fit <- survfit(Surv(hardflare_time, hardflare) ~ meno2, data = demo)

p <- ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = demo,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  pval = TRUE,
  pval.method = TRUE,
  pval.size = 5,
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
  risk.table = TRUE,
  fontsize = 6,
  legend.title = "",
  legend.labs = c(
    "Pre-menopausal",
    "Post-menopausal"
  ),
  font.legend = c(10),
  xlab = "Time from study recruitment (days)",
  font.x = c(14),
  font.y = c(14),
  title = "Time to objective flare stratified by menopausal status",
  font.title = c(14, "bold"),
  break.time.by = 200,
  palette = c("#b163c1", "#63c1b1")
)

dir.create("plots/ibd/hard-flare/menopause",
           recursive = TRUE,
           showWarnings = FALSE)
plot_path <- "plots/ibd/hard-flare/menopause/menopause2"

cairo_pdf(paste0(plot_path, ".pdf"))
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

png(paste0(plot_path, ".png"), width = 7, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(plot_path, ".png"))

# Fit Cox model
fit.me <- coxph(
  Surv(hardflare_time, hardflare) ~ Age + IMD + cat + BMIcat + Smoke + IBD_Duration + meno2 + frailty(SiteNo),
  control = coxph.control(outer.max = 20),
  data = demo
)

invisible(cox_summary(fit.me, plot_base_path = plot_path))
```

:::

## Hormonal Contraception

### Pre-menopausal Cohort

```{R}
# Filter to pre-menopausal women
demo_premeno <- demo %>%
  filter(
    Menopause == "No" |
      (Menopause == "Yes" & Age < 40 & 
         (FormContraception == "Yes" | PregnancyBreastfeeding == "Yes"))
  )
```

#### Crohn's Disease

::: {.panel-tabset group="followup"}

##### Patient-reported flare

```{R}
#| results: "hold"
#| output: "asis"
#| fig-height: 6.5

# Filter to CD patients
flare.cd.premeno.df <- demo_premeno %>%
  filter(diagnosis == "CD")

# Generate Kaplan-Meier survival plot
fit <- survfit(Surv(softflare_time, softflare) ~ hormonal2, data = flare.cd.premeno.df)

p <- ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = flare.cd.premeno.df,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  pval = TRUE,
  pval.method = TRUE,
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
  risk.table = TRUE,
  legend.title = "Use of hormonal contraception",
  legend.labs = c(
    "No",
    "Yes"
  ),
  xlab = "Time from study recruitment (days)",
  title = "Time to patient-reported flare (CD, pre-menopausal)",
  break.time.by = 200
)

dir.create("plots/cd/soft-flare/contraception",
           recursive = TRUE,
           showWarnings = FALSE)

plot_path <- "plots/cd/soft-flare/contraception/use"

cairo_pdf(paste0(plot_path, ".pdf"))
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

png(paste0(plot_path, ".png"), width = 7, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(plot_path, ".png"))

# Fit Cox model
fit.me <- coxph(
  Surv(softflare_time, softflare) ~ Age + IMD + cat + BMIcat + Smoke + hormonal2 + frailty(SiteNo),
  control = coxph.control(outer.max = 20),
  data = flare.cd.premeno.df
)

invisible(cox_summary(fit.me, plot_base_path = plot_path))
```

##### Objective flare

```{R}
#| results: "hold"
#| output: "asis"
#| fig-height: 6.5

# Generate Kaplan-Meier survival plot
fit <- survfit(Surv(hardflare_time, hardflare) ~ hormonal2, data = flare.cd.premeno.df)

p <- ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = flare.cd.premeno.df,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  pval = TRUE,
  pval.method = TRUE,
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
  risk.table = TRUE,
  legend.title = "Use of hormonal contraception",
  legend.labs = c(
    "No",
    "Yes"
  ),
  xlab = "Time from study recruitment (days)",
  title = "Time to objective flare (CD, pre-menopausal)",
  break.time.by = 200
)

dir.create("plots/cd/hard-flare/contraception",
           recursive = TRUE,
           showWarnings = FALSE)
plot_path <- "plots/cd/hard-flare/contraception/use"

cairo_pdf(paste0(plot_path, ".pdf"))
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

png(paste0(plot_path, ".png"), width = 7, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(plot_path, ".png"))

# Fit Cox model
fit.me <- coxph(
  Surv(hardflare_time, hardflare) ~ Age + IMD + cat + BMIcat + Smoke + hormonal2 + frailty(SiteNo),
  control = coxph.control(outer.max = 20),
  data = flare.cd.premeno.df
)

invisible(cox_summary(fit.me, plot_base_path = plot_path))
```

:::

#### Ulcerative Colitis

::: {.panel-tabset group="followup"}

##### Patient-reported flare

```{R}
#| results: "hold"
#| output: "asis"
#| fig-height: 6.5

# Filter to UC/IBDU patients
flare.uc.premeno.df <- demo_premeno %>%
  filter(!diagnosis == "CD")

# Generate Kaplan-Meier survival plot
fit <- survfit(Surv(softflare_time, softflare) ~ hormonal2, data = flare.uc.premeno.df)

p <- ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = flare.uc.premeno.df,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  pval = TRUE,
  pval.method = TRUE,
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
  risk.table = TRUE,
  legend.title = "Use of hormonal contraception",
  legend.labs = c(
    "No",
    "Yes"
  ),
  xlab = "Time from study recruitment (days)",
  title = "Time to patient-reported flare (UC/IBDU, pre-menopausal)",
  break.time.by = 200
)

dir.create("plots/uc/soft-flare/contraception",
           recursive = TRUE,
           showWarnings = FALSE)

plot_path <- "plots/uc/soft-flare/contraception/use"

cairo_pdf(paste0(plot_path, ".pdf"))
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

png(paste0(plot_path, ".png"), width = 7, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(plot_path, ".png"))

# Fit Cox model
fit.me <- coxph(
  Surv(softflare_time, softflare) ~ Age + IMD + cat + BMIcat + Smoke + hormonal2 + frailty(SiteNo),
  control = coxph.control(outer.max = 20),
  data = flare.uc.premeno.df
)

invisible(cox_summary(fit.me, plot_base_path = plot_path))
```

##### Objective flare

```{R}
#| results: "hold"
#| output: "asis"
#| fig-height: 6.5

# Generate Kaplan-Meier survival plot
fit <- survfit(Surv(hardflare_time, hardflare) ~ hormonal2, data = flare.uc.premeno.df)

p <- ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = flare.uc.premeno.df,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  pval = TRUE,
  pval.method = TRUE,
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
  risk.table = TRUE,
  legend.title = "Use of hormonal contraception",
  legend.labs = c(
    "No",
    "Yes"
  ),
  xlab = "Time from study recruitment (days)",
  title = "Time to objective flare (UC/IBDU, pre-menopausal)",
  break.time.by = 200
)

dir.create("plots/uc/hard-flare/contraception",
           recursive = TRUE,
           showWarnings = FALSE)
plot_path <- "plots/uc/hard-flare/contraception/use"

cairo_pdf(paste0(plot_path, ".pdf"))
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

png(paste0(plot_path, ".png"), width = 7, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)
print(p, newpage = FALSE)
invisible(dev.off())

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(plot_path, ".png"))

# Fit Cox model
fit.me <- coxph(
  Surv(hardflare_time, hardflare) ~ Age + IMD + cat + BMIcat + Smoke + hormonal2 + frailty(SiteNo),
  control = coxph.control(outer.max = 20),
  data = flare.uc.premeno.df
)

invisible(cox_summary(fit.me, plot_base_path = plot_path))
```

:::
